segments.text: Thank you.
Come forward, there's so many coming.
Some of you can sit on the chairs first now!
Still come forward, good.
Today I think you take back a little bit of that so
I never expected You all here but very happy to see
That our Melbourne has grown
So much ,so beautifully
Y'all look nice
It was quite a struggle
To begin with
But it worked out
And we have come together now
in such a beautiful way. In Ganpatipure, I couldn't talk to you directly that time
how many got married? In Ganpatipure this time from Wilbur but there were
very many Australians married. All right next time what I was told
most of the young boys and girls are married now we had problem because
The boys were all about six feet and the girls are below five feet.
But when I told them that, they said Mother you're so concerned over heights
So we're very thankful You can marry us
We don't mind
Otherwise see sometimes only on height people fight
It seems children have been happy in school
And there enjoying their
Now started a new thing again
is a gymnasium, where you have to learn gyms and
You'll have develop your bodies
To be Mr. Universe.
Such nice family efforts
And the way things are working out all over
The world it's very joy giving for me
It' s also easy for Sahaja Yoga
Just how to meditate
and penetrate more into subtler being that is yourself.
I am writing a book now, have been writing many
but this time there's the book falling down
which i gave it to CP
And he says its very subtle for
sorry
For Very Subtle People
I said Its meant only for Subtle people
What Am I To Do
Thats How Im
But still I would say that the society you are see around is very destructive.
The morality part, it's really disappointing
When i seen in newspapers and I'm really shocked how things are happening
And cannot explain why people behave like this
In these manner maybe we can say there some possessions
Maybe their genes or may be they're breathing
So, one of the things very important for Sahaja Yogis is to lead a very-very moral life.
With your morality as it is people are punished –as you know they get all kinds of diseases
and also problems in their family that affects our children but I always felt
that the society is to be looked after by women,
but a woman not by men so much.
They have been tolerant because it's their job
and for they are to do
there nothing inferior or superior on the contrary
as superior human would-be a very good housewife
could we're very good collective personality
she will become more sensible and balanced person
because she has a double job to do. Firstly, She's asked to establish Her children all right
give them proper training by her own life and then she is to look after the society
When you see that it is of society
That has taken so much of toll on so many young generation
I think Sahaja Yogis have a very great responsibility towards the pharaoh man in their own country.
We talk of so many things but actually it is surprised you all are gifted with
The power to emit vibrations by which You can correct our society
You are all the channels of those beautiful vibrations, which you must use and utilize.
But if do not pay attention to your vibrations
And into growth then these subtle powers that we have will not manifest
That is what I feel about Sahaja Yogis yet they've not realized how important they're
and what is their role, much more than any other incarnations, disciples,
incarnations pupils because you yourself are Realizers.
You yourselves know all the things –
All the subtleties that have
And if can just understand by spreading Sahaja Yoga
also go deeper within your self
you'll take it up and work in time. Of course, while spreading people are worried about their ego sometimes they think that
supposing we're successful then an ego might come out of it doesn't matter is part o f the game
but should see We have had some very big calamities recently many people became Mahayogis
You see, they were saying we are these. We're that.
We' re Mahayogi's and special people
And some of them really tumble down
So one has to be careful
One have to lead a balanced life
and balance attitude towards oneself
No use cursing anybody
Saying anything
That somebody else is responsible for your fault
We have one now in, I've heard about him. This Chinese fellow
his name is Sam. Don't know what a big Mahayogi's born there
Wherever he has been it will be such trouble at everywhere
He was the troubleshooter and how we think so end of himself
He had written a letter to say that Mother has given me powers
To get all businesses these times
Absolute nonsense! He' ssuch mad man
I knew he was mad, but I didn't know you go to that extent of madness.
So now – I don´t what do with such a person
only thing we can ask him is get out of Sahaja Yoga and that's all
But one has be careful when see people in such horrible vibrations
they are on their way to lunatic asylum
And if there were taking drugs or something like this
can understand. It's not so, it is always a kind of an ego that just crawls up and they start boasting
talking big! And ultimately then somebody in Milano said he was Adi Shakti
I said very good sense about my Sahaja Yoga. People don't tell Me this, I have to discover
See, it's very surprising that people once they find some Mahayogi there.
They just think I don't know what do you thing about him maybe
the things are not their business to say anything about the Mahayogis
but uh..they
Do come up here and then see
fine in every place
You also had somebody here
Once upon a time I dont' if he is still or no
So, you see there are people who take to all these tantric ways and
other kinds of things. And where do they end? They're just mad
peep that's what their so never take them and be careful
but when we are trying form some group please keep away from
I'm very happy for seeing your together so nicely
placed with each other. It's very, very satisfying and that shows the wisdom is there now to
understand value of a Sahaja Yoga.
Its all going on as I think in this Mahashivratri I'll have talk about these My Yogis also
because they are coming up here an'there and troubling their leaders
Now most or the leaders who were there
most of them I should say, are perfectly all right and really don't want to
anything about anyone. They can handle it they're the best
who have everything everybody you see is quite capable
as we get out with a situation whatever this thing must listen
because i cant talk for all off ui cannot
listen too much but
But this one gentleman who's there,
Who I think is very disabled.
So you talk to your leader and whatever the leader decides
You must accept otherwise what was he use of having a leader?
We have here good leaders for Melbourne
we are really good for Sydney
For world leader also we're so
Everybody seems be
Very much now equipped
To make good leaders
And kind people
So, there is no need to have any kind of a disobedience for nothing at all.
Those days are gone! Obedience he's not also blind
it' sfor your benevolence you needed and if
You did that something to feel bad about
Let's see we talk about me as a wife I am not
I'm not standing up because that would create the problem for the microphone
First of all, I am very honored and happy to be here with my wife.
And also very pleased that you see the faces which show love
and divinity in dedication for your mother
She has been talking about women
and that set me thinking, I began to think of the last 48 years we have been married.
And i just want tell you very briefly how she has performed
The role an ideal wife ,an ideal mother
An ideal grandmother in a family besides being the spiritual leader of Sahaja Yoga
When we got married, I belonged to a very conservative family.
She belong too radical family and it was good compliment each other but when she came
my house she behaved as if for generations she had lived in a very conservative
family and pleased everybody, the old lady of
their house who were looking a little worried.
They thought here's
A new lady from another province speaking
other language, professing
her religion how will she fit into our
Family?
But what
She did was
she won over
The heart
Of everyone by behaving
in
in a very modest way, in a loving and caring manner.
I have to admit that she became the favorite
but now i was lost
That is how our family life began
I was certainly happy about it
But then
I was a bureaucrat
civil servant
And unfortunately given an idea
that absolute honesty must be observed,
which meant we had to live in our means or a salary.
And all I have do was work at office
and left other problems of the house with my wife
she said here's what you can
and let me tell yo
She managed beautifully within her means
no possibility anything going wrong
We two children, two daughters
She brought them up and brought them up extremely well,
arranged for their education.
Arranged from the marriage they grew-up
I didn't know how but
From morning to late evening every day in office
But as she was in charge of house
she looked after not only my daughter
so that wanted this all of us have rich relations
And take care themselves
Take care
And we have in India poor relations as well.
When you are in a good position, the poor relations flock to
and they came our house children who needed education
each one of them was looked after by my wife
In same way
given their food
Only she could've done that
and they have grown up, they are now in so many places.
That was the role she played as a mother
not only to my children but also for her family
And then we grew further
She had a role play with me wife
I held some assignments of government
In India and abroad
The United Nations
When i was Secretary to the Prime Minister
Of india
About whom ive written a book now
She was the main motive force behind me.
In fact, I wouldn't have gone to Mr. Shastri
if she had not insisted that i must go
and went and served there
Mr.Shastri has very great respect for her
all because
of course
he obviously a spiritual person
but also
A very good mother
Very good housewife
And he used to ask her, how do you run your house?
What are our priorities.
As she would say what had said and Mr. Shastri listened
that now as a wife if she played that role
when I was working with prime minister sometimes
there will be in the office till midnight why
sometime every day some times early hours of morning
but she supported me this is your duty
now, due to your country and Prime Minister. You must work! Don't worry about the house
or children I'll take care of them." Then i went to United Nations there again my goodness
me you have one government was bad enough in India 130 governments all over were not
easy travelling meeting people receptions dinners a very busy life but she stood by
and while doing all that, she was at the same time promoting Sahaja Yoga. I don't know how
did it but uh...she had done a wonderful job you now I saw Sahaj yoga beginning with four
people in London and they were wearing jeans not very clean either
That for the beginning of sahaja yoga one day i came back home
and found a young boy, I'm talking 1974.
Young boy sitting in my drawing room
And when entered the house he looked at me
as if i was an stranger
He was real owner of this House
So I receded
I didn't quite understand
But what surprised even more
Was that you were wearing my clothes
I rubbed my eyes. I said, am i seeing something real or is it a dream?
Well then I receded and came to my wife
And asked who was this gentleman
So she explained that he's you know the poor young boy
He almost lying unattended to unhealth near Piccadilly Circus
She had gone out for shopping
And he saw her lying almost in a miserable condition.
She stood out of the car, went to that boy
and said why are you laying here?
Are You alright?
He said no I was not well at all
since they want take care off me
No there is none
That's awful
Then she said okay
Hopped into his car
then brought him home
And then he was given a wash. He had no clothes, so
we had to wear my clothes and that's how I wore my clothes
Then for the next some weeks
We stayed in their house
There i saw Sahaja Yoga acting
This boy was suffering from
I think
He was very bad shape
Within 3-4 weeks
he blossomed. Another thing was, he became a healthy person and we then got to know that
He came from Australia
A young engineer who had run away form his house
And was in bad shape
After he was cured
He became very good
Person
Came back to Australia
United with his mother
I don't where is him
But
That's what I saw
The Miraculous Sahaja Yoga
And from those four persons, yes before I talked to them once
came back home and found there were 4 persons wearing jeans
again they did not know who their where but they wear sahaja yogis
They are the initial sahajogies. Well then
To this is a marvel! All i can say
despite all her attention on family
me have been busy person
she attended of duty for the family
she has created a new universal family of Sahaja Yoga.
Each sahaj yogi, in my view is an angel and I mean this
because i have no human beings
the world
The word is terrible
if you look at newspapers
You will see all kinds
Of horror stories
but when you meet a sahaji yogi
he or
She's very different person
Her face is different
The inner self is different, the outer self is different.
It's another creation and she has created
thousands of such persons each one
a few is a miracle you know it very difficult
to transform human beings I have worked
in United Nations India for 40 years
i cannot honestly say that
was able to transform even
1 human being yes people followed by example
work hard but thats not transformation
Transformation is what I see in you and that's a miracle. That was she has done
And now, new world will be created
I sincerely hope that Sahaja Yoga will spread more rapidly
It has spread very fast but it needs to spread much faster
And all over the World there are races between the forces of good
You represent the force of good
The forces of evil outside
Have heart
and have the courage, she, her vibrations
your vibrations will I hope
honor of world and create a good word
And this bad words will be suppressed
Will disappear. This is all that i can say
Thank you very much for receiving me here
Im delighted to be in Australia
I liked my visit immensely already
I think in Australia, the beautiful thing is that
The advantages of a developed world are present here
But their heart seems to be very good
Very sound
Wonderful
You're open-hearted people
Warm People
Loving people
And i cannot say how
Very adequately
How happy and grateful
Thank you ma'am
For letting me come to Australia
and I'm going to enjoy myself. So, that's all that I can say.
I think we are really there for the puja.
Shri Mataji Puja is a most important puja
from spiritual point of view
–I hope you'll make it comfortable
to be there and this shivarati should create something more within you,
see the vision that I have about whole world.
And a simple housewife as we can seen
And they want to feel that you're just a housewife and good for nothing.
Even if You create one great man as the Mother, it's
The greatest achievement than
To earn all kinds of laurels in this world
I'm happy he could come
This time when He is going
to write this book because I knew Shastri Ji was a realized soul and that, uh...a person
like is lost in our country which requires really someone of the caliber. It has happened
so…I hope you all will read it and understand its value or reading a good life actually
i always say that politicians don't realize how they go into history if we could just
this point, they won't do all these nonsensical things that
They Do. But I think the are not conscious of what position
The have and What is their opportunity
By which they can show to whole world
Through politics there has been able to create
A great vision or a Great work
This Is only difference between great politicians
and other politicians. Their morality, everything is very important because people try to follow
them – they are our ideas! And this what it's very saddening that
They don't realize their position is everybody even as I said the housewives or
men or the fathers, if they realize what is their – now I would not call it duty but
What is their identity? Things will work out very smoothly and they'll enjoy everything, whatever
I'm really so overjoyed to see you all. And the children are here
They're happy about this school
We have even a university there
About that school one thing we decided not affiliate with this Cambridge business
because they are very demanding that. They want to have a football grounds in those mountains, you see
all kinds of things the wanted for what? And Cambridge is such difficult university nobody can get admitted there
Very difficult! You've got at least four A's and one B+. So like that if your so excellent
in your studies, then only you can go there and we may have one or two like that but for
them to spend all the money ,to change everything is very difficult.
To get teachers who teach all kinds of languages is very difficult so best thing
least pass this examination ICSE which
You can join any university after that if you pass a few examinations as they have in America and India.
So there is no need to trouble our children, load them with so much of studies for what?
Hardly one or two might get into the University
And somehow I've known about Cambridge it's not such practical University
It is more theoretical. So this ink has to go from our head, I think it's a more our
slavish mentality that we think Cambridge in the last word for every kind of education
You can become bureaucrat with That you Can be a consultant but what else
can he do because its all theoretical so i hope the parents don't mind if
Children don't take to these, but just do ICSE. Maybe it is possible we might have our own university for that
so It's quite
Possible you can get good professors from abroad and form everywhere
And make a very good University which give them practical knowledge
An uh..very good degrees in India only
Now as You know India has opened its economy an things are working out very well
I,I am not now the opinion that we should send our children to places where it is so difficult and
The education Is Not So Good.
i was surprised That even in Australia the standards have gone down
SO MUCH IN EDUCATION.
The parents blame the teachers ,the teacher blames the parents but
Something has To be done about Children here also those who are studying
I don't know how far we can help them, but at least the school in the Roshara has done good
and i am very thankful that majority of children are Australians
as they're doing well. They've very disciplined, very sweet children
And there's a really good reports about Australian Children
It is surprising because it doesn´t have so much education which you call pre-school
But they are very sensible children there and full of life, very hard-working so I think
if you have any problems. You may write to Me when i am here
uh..I'll deal with them
Any real problem which we had
Otherwise hope see for the program
And later on for Pooja in Sydney
May God bless you.
